utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: God . I forgot how much I love driving . I have got to get my license renewed .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: You do not have a valid driver’s license ... Okay that is it ! Pull over right now !

emotion_cause.span: 2_You do not have a valid driver’s license

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Oh Ross you are so tense ! You just gotta relax , okay ? Just need to relax all right ? Just need to relax

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: What ... what are you doing ? ! Are you ... Okay that is not funny ! Just stop horsing around !

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: I am not horsing around , okay ? I am Porsching around .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Okay , stay calm . Nothing is going to happen to you , you are not in that much trouble .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: I was talking to myself ! You are going down !
